name: Surrounded Regions
description: Given an m x n matrix board containing 'X' and 'O', capture all regions that are 4-directionally surrounded by 'X'. A region is captured by flipping all 'O's into 'X's. 'O's on the border or connected to border 'O's are not captured.
constraints: m == board.length. n == board[i].length. 1 <= m, n <= 200. board[i][j] is 'X' or 'O'.
